title: Life-form analyzer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''life-form analyzer''' was a portable [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] package that could be carried by an individual, or linked to the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] systems of land vehicles or [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. They aggregated information and provided information on the structure and nature of life forms within its range. Life-form analyzers determined the nature of life-forms by using a combination of computer algorithms, sensor scans, and [[life form indicator]]s to identify life forms. They could not, however, identify unknown life forms. Life-form analyzers used a myriad of factors to determine the identity of a life form, including heart rate, ambient [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], respiratory byproducts, molecule-chain EM polarization effects, and heat signatures.<ref name="DFRSB">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''</ref>

The [[Agonizer-6 nerve disruptor]] used a life-form analyzer to monitor a [[Torture/Legends|torture]] victim's vital signs, including heartbeat, respiration, and nerve functions.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}}
